testcase.name: getLaunchtestingBaba

error.message:
element click intercepted: Element ... is not clickable at point (599, 39). Other element would receive the click:
(Session info: chrome=122.0.6261.69) Build info: version: '4.25.0', revision: '8a8aea2337' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '17.0.10' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.remote.RemoteWebDriver Command: [beebf487ad0a6df44d5d89c125ffb26e, clickElement {id=f.DB9BF8A60F68885DECF362B240471C3B.d.6B569D5B2CB32DC037D86B4E8C664269.e.56}] Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 122.0.6261.69, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 122.0.6261.69 (81bc525b6a36..., userDataDir: /tmp/.org.chromium.Chromium...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:36431}, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: linux, proxy: Proxy(), se:bidiEnabled: false, se:cdp: ws://172.19.0.4:4444/sessio..., se:cdpVersion: 122.0.6261.69, se:vnc: ws://172.19.0.4:4444/sessio..., se:vncEnabled: true, se:vncLocalAddress: ws://172.19.0.4:7900, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Element: [[RemoteWebDriver: chrome on linux (beebf487ad0a6df44d5d89c125ffb26e)] -> xpath: //*[text()='Practice']] Session ID: beebf487ad0a6df44d5d89c125ffb26e
